query:
UPDATE notebooks 
SET 
  viewCount = FLOOR(50 + (RAND() * 450)),
  downloadCount = FLOOR(10 + (RAND() * 90))
WHERE id > 0;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ocoPq9UKt9MVUJb.root --database cF5vY7QXosm6HAcTf29xyM --execute UPDATE notebooks 
SET 
  viewCount = FLOOR(50 + (RAND() * 450)),
  downloadCount = FLOOR(10 + (RAND() * 90))
WHERE id > 0;
